candidates.description: Table paste conversion: auto-convert HTML tables and TSV/CSV clipboard data into Markdown tables when pasting in editor mode
candidates.rationale: Mikedown's paste handler only loads raw text. Users frequently copy tables from spreadsheets and web pages — converting to Markdown tables on paste is a significant usability improvement.
candidates.key_insight: Detect text/html with <table> tags in clipboard, parse via DOMParser, and convert cells to pipe-delimited Markdown. Also detect tab/comma-separated text and convert to Markdown tables.

candidates.description: Interactive checkboxes: make task list checkboxes clickable in the preview pane, toggling the corresponding markdown source
candidates.rationale: Mikedown renders GFM task lists but checkboxes are static. Making them interactive (click to toggle [x]/[ ]) improves the editing experience for TODO-style documents.
candidates.key_insight: Add click handler on input[type=checkbox] in the rendered HTML. Find the Nth checkbox in the markdown source and toggle its state, then update the store.

candidates.description: Auto-save to file: automatically save dirty files to disk after a debounce period, preventing data loss
candidates.rationale: Mikedown only auto-saves drafts to localStorage. For files with a known path, auto-saving to disk after 3s of inactivity prevents data loss from crashes or accidental closes.
candidates.key_insight: When a tab has a filePath and is dirty, debounce-write the content to disk using Tauri's writeTextFile. Show a brief 'saved' indicator. Skip for untitled/new tabs.

candidates.description: Session tab persistence: save and restore all open tabs across app restarts
candidates.rationale: Mikedown only restores a single draft. Saving the full tab state (file paths, active tab) to localStorage and restoring on launch gives a seamless restart experience.
candidates.key_insight: On tab changes, persist tab metadata (filePaths, activeTabId) to localStorage. On mount, reload files from those paths. Don't persist content — re-read from disk for freshness.

candidates.description: Document outline: extract headings from markdown and display a navigable table of contents in the sidebar
candidates.rationale: For long documents, a heading outline provides quick navigation. Mikedown already has a sidebar but no outline view. Headings can be extracted during markdown parsing.
candidates.key_insight: Parse ATX headings (# to ######) while skipping code blocks. Display as an indented list in the sidebar. Click to scroll to the heading's rendered element by ID.
